name: rs-hebdo-delivery
description: RS Hebdo Delivery Platform - Rolling Stone France

scripts.postinstall: cd backend && npm ci && cd ../frontend && npm ci
scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend && rm -rf dist node_modules/.vite && npm run build
scripts.build:backend: cd backend && rm -rf dist && npm run build
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
